productDisplayName: Global Desi Women Printed Pink Top
description: CompositionPink printed round neck sleeveless kurta made of 100% cotton, has a woven tape detailing along the neckline and arm holes, a split neckline with a yoke and sequin and lace detailing in the yoke FitRegularWash careDry clean for the first two washes and hand wash in mild detergent thereafterWarm ironTrue to its name, global desi specialises in global styles with ethnic Indian threads and print. Combining classic prints on modern cuts with slimming silhouettes, this Indo-Western top blends cuts, colour, embellishments and the vibrancy of Indian fabrics to create a garment that you can team with a churidar, shalwar, patialas or even leggings.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
